questionHtml:
A black-body radiator emits a peak wavelength of λmax and a maximum power of P0. The peak wavelength emitted by a second black-body radiator with the same surface area is 2 λmax. What is the total power of the second black-body radiator?

A.  116P0

B.  12P0

C.  2P0

D.  16P0

meta.title: A black-body radiator emits a peak wavelength of λmax and a maximum power of P0. The peak wavelength emitted by a second black-body radiator with the same surface area is 2 λmax. W
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
